titleStmt.title: SII 37.154: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 154. (A.R. No. B 31 of 1940.) Kōṭapāḍu, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in the Āvulamāla 1(1/2) miles to the west of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1530 (wrong) Parīdhāvi, Māgha, śu 1.

It states that Kōṭapāṭi Baśireḍi, China Māchumāchi-Reḍḍi, Karṇam Vīrappa and China Rāmanna conducted a paruśa for the cattle belonging to Rāvivāru, had the cows and bulls given and also made gift of 6(1/2) kunṭas of land to one individual by name Yellappa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulagu
nēṭi 1530 Ayinaṭi paridhāvi saṁvvaṁ
tsara māga śu 1 lu . kōṭapāṭi baśireḍi
cinamācu mācireḍḍi karaṇaṁ vīrappacina
rāmaṁnnagāru rāvivāri Āvulaku paru
śaśēyiṁcci Āvula yeddula vrāyiṁccinā
ru ganaka yiṁdulaku yallappa pēra kōṭa
pāṭi grāmāna cēnu Ārukuṁṭala maḍi Araku
ṁṭeḍu naḍupagalavāru yiṁdulaku ta
ppitivāyenā kāśilō brāṁhmaṇi
vala caṁpiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvā
ru yiṁdulaku yavaru kīḍudala
ṁcinavāru gōbrāṁhmala vadhiṁ
cina vāpāpāna pōdru
Digital edition of SII 37.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
